test_cases.test_case: Open Client Detail from Clients table via View link
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
At least one client <target client> exists in the Clients list
steps: 1. On the Clients page, locate the row for <target client>
2. Click the View link in the Name column for <target client>
test_cases.expected_result: Client Detail page is displayed for <target client> showing the client's name and a Status badge

test_cases.test_case: Open Bulk Import page from Clients page
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Clients page is displayed
steps: 1. Click the Import Client button in the top-right of the Clients page
test_cases.expected_result: Bulk Import page is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Open Create Client wizard from Clients page
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Clients page is displayed
steps: 1. Click the Create Client button in the top-right of the Clients page
test_cases.expected_result: Create Client wizard opens to Step 1 'General Details' showing Office and Submitted On as required fields

test_cases.test_case: Download Client Excel Template from Bulk Import page
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Bulk Import page is displayed
steps: 1. Click the 'Download Client Excel Template' button on the Bulk Import page
test_cases.expected_result: Client Excel template file download is triggered in the browser

test_cases.test_case: Upload completed import file and verify import history entry
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Bulk Import page is displayed
steps: 1. Click 'Upload Completed File' and select <valid import file>
2. Click the Upload button
test_cases.expected_result: A new row appears in the Import History table for the uploaded import and that row includes a Download link

test_cases.test_case: Download import result from Import History
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Bulk Import page is displayed
An import entry for <uploaded import> exists in the Import History table
steps: 1. In the Import History table, locate the row for <uploaded import>
2. Click the Download action/link for that import row
test_cases.expected_result: Import result file download is triggered in the browser

test_cases.test_case: Complete Create Client wizard (all steps) and submit to create Pending client
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Create Client wizard is open
steps: 1. On Step 1 'General Details', select <Office>, enter <First Name>, enter <Last Name>, and enter <Submitted On>
2. Click Next to go to Step 2 'Address Details'
3. On Step 2, enter <address details> (use available address fields)
4. Click Next to go to Step 3 'Family Members'
5. On Step 3, add a family member by entering <family member details>
6. Click Next to go to Step 4 'Identifiers'
7. On Step 4, click Add Identifier, enter <Document Type> and <Document Key>
8. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Client Detail page is displayed showing the new client's Status badge as 'Pending' (yellow)

test_cases.test_case: Create Client wizard - verify Address Details (Step 2) is saved after submission
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Create Client wizard is open
steps: 1. On Step 1 'General Details', select <Office>, enter <First Name>, enter <Last Name>, and enter <Submitted On>
2. Click Next to go to Step 2 'Address Details'
3. Enter <address details> into the address form on Step 2
4. Click Next to proceed through Steps 3 and 4 (fill required fields as needed)
5. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Client Detail page is displayed and the client's address (entered on Step 2) is visible on the appropriate tab or General section

test_cases.test_case: Create Client wizard - verify Family Members (Step 3) are saved after submission
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Create Client wizard is open
steps: 1. On Step 1 'General Details', fill required fields and click Next
2. On Step 2, optionally fill address and click Next
3. On Step 3 'Family Members', click Add Family Member and enter <family member details>
4. Click Next to Step 4, fill required identifier fields, then Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Client Detail page is displayed and the Family Members tab lists the added family member with the entered details

test_cases.test_case: Create Client wizard - add Identifiers (Step 4) and verify on detail page
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
Create Client wizard is open
steps: 1. Complete Steps 1–3 as needed to reach Step 4 'Identifiers'
2. On Step 4 click Add Identifier, enter <Document Type> and <Document Key>
3. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Client Detail page is displayed and the Identifiers tab lists the added identifier with the entered Document Type and Document Key

test_cases.test_case: Activate Pending client by providing a valid Activation Date
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Pending state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client> by clicking View in the Clients table
2. Click the Activate action in the action bar
3. Enter <valid Activation Date> (must not be before the client's Submitted On)
4. Click Confirm on the Activate dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Status badge updates to 'Active' (green) on the Client Detail page and the Activation Date field displays the entered date

test_cases.test_case: Open Edit client form from Pending state
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Pending state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Edit action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Edit client form is displayed with the General Details pre-populated for <target client>

test_cases.test_case: Reject a Pending client with a reason
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Pending state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Reject action in the action bar
3. Enter <Reason> in the Reject dialog and click Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: Status badge updates to 'Rejected' (red) on the Client Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Withdraw a Pending client with a reason
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Pending state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Withdraw action in the action bar
3. Enter <Reason> in the Withdraw dialog and click Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: Status badge updates to 'Withdrawn' (orange) on the Client Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Open Edit client form from Active state
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Edit action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Edit client form is displayed with the client's current data pre-populated

test_cases.test_case: Transfer Active client to a different office
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state at <current office>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Transfer Client action in the action bar
3. Select <Destination_Office> (different from <current office>) and click Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: Office field on the Client Detail page updates to the selected destination office

test_cases.test_case: Close an Active client with closure reason when no active accounts exist
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state and has no active accounts
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Close action in the action bar
3. Enter <Closure_Reason> and click Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: Status badge updates to 'Closed' (gray) on the Client Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Add a charge to an Active client and verify it appears
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Add Charge action in the action bar
3. In the Add Charge dialog/form enter <charge details> and click Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: The client's Charges list displays a new charge entry with the entered details

test_cases.test_case: Initiate New Loan creation for an Active client
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the New Loan action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Loan creation page or wizard is opened with <target client> pre-selected

test_cases.test_case: Initiate New Savings account creation for an Active client
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the New Savings action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Savings account creation page or wizard is opened with <target client> pre-selected

test_cases.test_case: Initiate New Share Account creation for an Active client
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Active state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the New Share Account action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Share account creation page or wizard is opened with <target client> pre-selected

test_cases.test_case: Reactivate a Closed client
preconditions: User logged in as <role>
A client <target client> exists in Closed state
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for <target client>
2. Click the Reactivate action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Status badge updates to 'Active' (green) on the Client Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Bulk import: attempt upload with no file selected (required file_upload blank)
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Bulk Import page
steps: 1. Ensure the Upload Completed File field is left empty
2. Click the Upload button
test_cases.expected_result: Upload Completed File field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; import does not start and no entry is added to import history

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: leave a required text field (First Name) blank and submit
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and Create Client wizard is accessible
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Leave the First_Name field blank
3. Fill other required fields with valid values: enter <valid Office> in Office, enter <valid Last Name> in Last_Name, enter <valid Submitted_On date> in Submitted_On
4. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: First_Name field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: leave required dropdown (Office) blank and submit
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and Create Client wizard is accessible
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Leave the Office dropdown unselected
3. Fill other required fields with valid values: enter <valid First Name> in First_Name, enter <valid Last Name> in Last_Name, enter <valid Submitted_On date> in Submitted_On
4. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Office field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: leave required date (Submitted On) blank and submit
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and Create Client wizard is accessible
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Leave the Submitted_On field blank
3. Fill other required fields with valid values: enter <valid Office> in Office, enter <valid First Name> in First_Name, enter <valid Last Name> in Last_Name
4. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Submitted_On field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: enter invalid format in Email Address field
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and Create Client wizard is accessible
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email_Address field

3. Fill other required fields with valid values: enter <valid Office> in Office, enter <valid First Name> in First_Name, enter <valid Last Name> in Last_Name, enter <valid Submitted_On date> in Submitted_On
4. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Email_Address field displays an inline validation error indicating the email is invalid (e.g. 'Must be a valid email address'); form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: submit with External ID that duplicates an existing client (uniqueness constraint)
preconditions: An existing client with External_ID = <existing external id> exists
User has permission to create clients
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Enter <existing external id> in the External_ID field

3. Fill other required fields with valid values: enter <valid Office> in Office, enter <valid First Name> in First_Name, enter <valid Last Name> in Last_Name, enter <valid Submitted_On date> in Submitted_On
4. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: External_ID field displays an inline validation error: 'must be unique'; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client (Identifiers): leave required Identifier item field Document_Type blank and submit
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and can reach Identifiers step in Create Client wizard
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Complete prior steps with valid values so you can navigate to the Identifiers step
3. Add one Identifier item, leave its Document_Type blank and enter <valid Document Key> in Document_Key
4. Click Submit on the wizard
test_cases.expected_result: Document_Type field on the identifier item displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client (Identifiers): add duplicate Document_Type + Document_Key combinations and submit
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and can reach Identifiers step in Create Client wizard
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Complete prior steps with valid values so you can navigate to the Identifiers step
3. Add an Identifier item with Document_Type = <X> and Document_Key = <Y>
4. Add a second Identifier item with Document_Type = <X> and Document_Key = <Y> (same values)
5. Click Submit on the wizard
test_cases.expected_result: A validation error is shown near the Identifiers section with the message: 'duplicate Document_Type + Document_Key combinations are not allowed'; form does not submit and no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: submit wizard with ALL required fields empty
preconditions: User has permission to create clients and Create Client wizard is accessible
steps: 1. Open the Create Client wizard
2. Leave all required fields blank (Office, First_Name, Last_Name, Submitted_On, and any required identifier fields)
3. Click Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; inline validation errors appear on Office, First_Name, Last_Name, Submitted_On (and any required Identifier fields) indicating they are required; no client is created

test_cases.test_case: Pending: Activate dialog - leave Activation Date blank and submit
preconditions: A client in Pending state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Pending status
2. Click the Activate action
3. Leave Activation_Date blank in the Activate dialog
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Activate dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Activation_Date field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; client remains in Pending status and no activation occurs

test_cases.test_case: Pending: Activate with Activation Date before Submitted On (constraint violation)
preconditions: A client in Pending state exists with Submitted_On = <submitted date>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for that Pending client
2. Click the Activate action
3. Enter <activation date before submitted date> into Activation_Date
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Activate dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Activation_Date field displays an inline validation error quoting the constraint: 'must not be before Submitted_On'; client remains in Pending status and no activation occurs

test_cases.test_case: Pending: Reject dialog - leave Reason blank and submit
preconditions: A client in Pending state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Pending status
2. Click the Reject action
3. Leave the Reason field blank in the Reject dialog
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Reject dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Reason field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; client remains in Pending status and is not marked Rejected

test_cases.test_case: Pending: Withdraw dialog - leave Reason blank and submit
preconditions: A client in Pending state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Pending status
2. Click the Withdraw action
3. Leave the Reason field blank in the Withdraw dialog
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Withdraw dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Reason field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; client remains in Pending status and is not marked Withdrawn

test_cases.test_case: Active: Transfer Client - leave Destination Office blank and submit
preconditions: A client in Active state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Active status
2. Click the Transfer Client action
3. Leave Destination_Office unselected in the Transfer dialog
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Transfer dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Destination_Office field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; transfer does not occur and client's Office remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Active: Transfer Client to the same office (destination must differ constraint)
preconditions: A client in Active state exists with Current Office = <current office>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for that Active client
2. Click the Transfer Client action
3. Select Destination_Office = <current office> (same as client's current office)
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Transfer dialog
test_cases.expected_result: A validation error is shown quoting the constraint: 'destination office must differ from current office'; transfer does not occur and client's Office remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Active: Close dialog - leave Closure Reason blank and submit
preconditions: A client in Active state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Active status
2. Click the Close action
3. Leave Closure_Reason blank in the Close dialog
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Close dialog
test_cases.expected_result: Closure_Reason field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; client remains in Active status and is not closed

test_cases.test_case: Active: attempt to Close a client who has active accounts (precondition violation)
preconditions: A client in Active state exists and the client has one or more active accounts
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the Active client with active accounts
2. Click the Close action
3. Enter <valid Closure Reason> in Closure_Reason
4. Click Submit/Confirm on the Close dialog
test_cases.expected_result: UI blocks the close action and displays the precondition error quoting: 'cannot close with active accounts'; client remains in Active status and is not closed

test_cases.test_case: Wrong-state: attempt Transfer Client from a Pending client (action unavailable in Pending)
preconditions: A client in Pending state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Pending status
2. Attempt to locate or click a Transfer Client action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer Client button is not visible in the action bar for a Pending client; action cannot be initiated

test_cases.test_case: Wrong-state: attempt Activate from an Active client (action unavailable in Active)
preconditions: A client in Active state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Active status
2. Attempt to locate or click an Activate action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Activate button is not visible in the action bar for an Active client; action cannot be initiated and client's status remains Active

test_cases.test_case: Wrong-state: attempt Transfer Client from a Closed client (action unavailable in Closed)
preconditions: A client in Closed state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Closed status
2. Attempt to locate or click a Transfer Client action in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer Client button is not visible in the action bar for a Closed client; action cannot be initiated and client's Office remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Wrong-state: Rejected client should show no available actions (action bar empty)
preconditions: A client in Rejected state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Rejected status
2. Observe the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: No action buttons are visible in the action bar for a Rejected client (available_actions is empty); no actions can be initiated

test_cases.test_case: Wrong-state: Withdrawn client should show no available actions (action bar empty)
preconditions: A client in Withdrawn state exists and user can access its Client Detail page
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for a client in Withdrawn status
2. Observe the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: No action buttons are visible in the action bar for a Withdrawn client (available_actions is empty); no actions can be initiated

test_cases.test_case: Activate: Activation_Date equal to Submitted_On (same day) succeeds
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status with a known Submitted_On date <Submitted_On>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the pending client
2. Click the 'Activate' action button
3. In the Activation_Date field enter <Submitted_On> (exact same date as the client's Submitted_On)
4. Click the Activate/Confirm button
test_cases.expected_result: Activation succeeds; client status changes to Active (green badge) and the Client Detail page displays Activation_Date equal to <Submitted_On>

test_cases.test_case: Activate: Activation_Date one day before Submitted_On is blocked with validation error
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status with a known Submitted_On date <Submitted_On>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the pending client
2. Click the 'Activate' action button
3. In the Activation_Date field enter <one day before Submitted_On>
4. Click the Activate/Confirm button
test_cases.expected_result: Activation is blocked; the Activation_Date field shows a visible validation error indicating the date must not be before Submitted_On and the client remains in Pending status

test_cases.test_case: Transfer Client: selecting the same office as current is blocked
preconditions: A client exists in Active status and is assigned to <Office A>
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the active client
2. Click the 'Transfer Client' action button
3. In the Destination_Office dropdown select <Office A> (the same as the current office)
4. Click the Submit/Transfer button
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer is blocked; Destination_Office field shows a visible validation error indicating the destination office must differ from the current office and the client's Office remains <Office A>

test_cases.test_case: Transfer Client: selecting a different office succeeds
preconditions: A client exists in Active status and is assigned to <Office A>
A different office <Office B> is available to select
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the active client
2. Click the 'Transfer Client' action button
3. In the Destination_Office dropdown select <Office B> (different from current office)
4. Click the Submit/Transfer button
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer succeeds; client remains Active and the Client Detail page displays Office = <Office B>

test_cases.test_case: Create Client: leading/trailing whitespace in First/Last Name is trimmed on save
preconditions: User has access to Create Client wizard
steps: 1. Open Create_Client_Wizard
2. In the Office field select a valid office
3. In the First_Name field enter value with leading and trailing spaces: <leading/trailing spaced First_Name>
4. In the Last_Name field enter value with leading and trailing spaces: <leading/trailing spaced Last_Name>
5. Fill all other required fields (e.g., Submitted_On) with valid values
6. Click the Submit button on the wizard
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; client is created in Pending status and the Client Detail page displays First_Name and Last_Name trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace (no extra spaces visible)

test_cases.test_case: Reject: very long Reason text (>200 chars) is accepted and saved with the rejection
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status
steps: 1. Open the Client Detail page for the pending client
2. Click the 'Reject' action button
3. In the Reason field enter a very long text string of 200+ characters: <very long reason>
4. Click the Submit/Confirm button to apply the rejection
test_cases.expected_result: Reject action succeeds; client status changes to Rejected and the full provided Reason text (the 200+ character input) is visible on the Client Detail page (activity log or rejection reason field) without truncation indicated

test_cases.test_case: Create Client wizard: attempting to jump to a later step is blocked when earlier required fields are incomplete (linear wizard enforcement)
preconditions: User has access to Create Client wizard
steps: 1. Open Create_Client_Wizard
2. Without filling required Step 1 fields, click the Step 4 (Identifiers) tab/header directly
3. Observe which wizard step becomes active
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation to Step 4 is blocked; the wizard remains on Step 1, required fields in Step 1 are visually indicated (highlighted) and a message or inline validation indicates Step 1 must be completed before advancing

test_cases.test_case: Create Client wizard: add then remove all Identifier entries and submit (zero identifiers) succeeds
preconditions: User has access to Create Client wizard
steps: 1. Open Create_Client_Wizard and navigate to Step 4 (Identifiers)
2. Click 'Add Identifier' to add one item to the Identifiers repeating group
3. For the new identifier row enter valid values in Document_Type and Document_Key
4. Remove the identifier row so the repeating group has zero items
5. Navigate back to Step 1 and fill all required fields (Office, First_Name, Last_Name, Submitted_On) with valid values
6. Click the Submit button on the wizard
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; client is created in Pending status and the Client Detail page shows no identifiers listed in the Identifiers tab (zero entries)
